top_signals.title: Coty Launches Marc Jacobs Beauty: One of the Most-Requested Luxury Comebacks
top_signals.summary: Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) today announced the launch of Marc Jacobs Beauty, the color cosmetics collection long anticipated by the brand’s loyal following. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260520340714/en/ The collection is built around “Joyride Sensoriality”, Marc Jacobs Beauty’s concept of an immersive, pleasurable experience that engages the senses, because [...]
